news.headline: Jim Cramer Won’t Touch POET. The Reddit Crowd Thinks He’s Wrong. Somebody’s About to Lose a Lot of Money
news.summary: Jim Cramer has been circling POET Technologies (NASDAQ:POET) for months, intrigued by the pitch but refusing to bite. news.headline: UBS Maintains Buy on Marvell Technology, Raises Price Target to $230
news.summary: UBS  analyst Timothy Arcuri   maintains Marvell Technology (NASDAQ:MRVL) with a Buy and raises the price target from $195 to $230.

news.headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Marvell Technology, Raises Price Target to $225
news.summary: Citigroup  analyst Atif Malik   maintains Marvell Technology (NASDAQ:MRVL) with a Buy and raises the price target from $215 to $225.
